arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca sends Joao Felix brutal message after FA Cup brace

arts.ttl: Chelsea BOMBSHELL: Maresca eyes shock move for Championship striker
arts.sum: The 26-year-old has scored 12 goals in 26 Championship appearances so far this season and his form at The Hawthorns has attracted the attention of both Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur, as per Fichajes . Maja netted three goals in 15 Premier League games during a six-month loan spell with Fulham in 2021, but the bulk of his experience in English football has come in the Championship and League One.

arts.ttl: Dortmund keen to sign Chelsea defender Veiga
arts.sum: German side Borussia Dortmund open talks to sign Chelsea defender Renato Veiga on an initial loan deal.

Napoli have officially announced the acquisition of Danish midfielder Philip Anyanwu Billing from Bournemouth on a loan deal that includes an option to buy. This transfer comes after Napoli's recent decision to loan out Folorunsho to Fiorentina under a similar arrangement. The post OFFICIAL: Napoli Sign Philip Billing appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: The miserable Raheem Sterling and Manchester United record that continued as Arsenal exit the FA Cup
